findings.title: Progress ShareFile Pre-Auth RCE Chain — CVE-2026-2699 + CVE-2026-2701
findings.summary: watchTowr disclosed two chained vulnerabilities (auth bypass + arbitrary file upload) in ShareFile Storage Zones Controller enabling unauthenticated remote code execution on customer-managed deployments.

findings.title: CVE-2026-0331 — Claude Code Context Poisoning Vulnerability
findings.summary: Adversa AI discovered a critical context poisoning vulnerability in Claude Code days after Anthropic accidentally leaked 512,000 lines of source code via npm, enabling potential arbitrary command execution on developer machines.

findings.title: 36 Malicious npm Packages Disguised as Strapi Plugins Deploy Redis/PostgreSQL Implants
findings.summary: SafeDep discovered 36 malicious npm packages by four sock-puppet accounts impersonating Strapi CMS plugins, deploying eight payload variants including Redis crontab injection, PostgreSQL credential theft, reverse shells, and persistent implants.

findings.title: EvilTokens Device Code Phishing — 37x Surge in OAuth Account Takeover
findings.summary: Push Security documented a 37.5x surge in device code phishing pages attributed to the EvilTokens PhaaS platform, commoditizing an MFA-bypassing OAuth attack technique against Microsoft 365 accounts.

findings.title: FortiClientEMS CVE-2026-35616 — Zero-Day Window Confirmed, Easter Weekend Exploitation
findings.summary: CSA research confirms CVE-2026-35616 was actively exploited as a zero-day starting March 31 — four days before Fortinet's April 4 emergency disclosure — with the attack window deliberately timed to Easter weekend staffing gaps.

noted.summary: AI-discovered vulnerability found by Claude Code in FreeBSD demonstrating autonomous vulnerability research capabilities.
Heap-based buffer overflow in JPEG loader (CVSS 7.5) with public PoC on GitHub affecting Linux systems processing untrusted images.
Metasploit module now live for unauthenticated RCE via ZWSP .htaccess bypass, making exploitation trivial.
Authenticated RCE via Direct Install feature with Metasploit module released April 3.
LinkedIn using hidden JavaScript to scan 6,000+ installed Chrome extensions and collect device data from visitors.
Microsoft details stealth technique using HTTP cookies as control channel for PHP web shells persisting via cron on Linux servers.
